data.name: Hentai World Bunny
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to Hentai World Bunny ! Are you ready to challenge your concentration and perseverance? In this game, you'll step into a lively yet simple setting, where your objective is to find and match pairs of identical images. With an arcade-style design, you'll enjoy endless entertainment while testing your skills.

Features:

Classic arcade-style matching gameplay.

Soothing background music.

Full-screen mode available after completion.

Prepare for an exciting ! No need to worry scores—just relax, have fun, and explore the vibrant world of Hentai World Bunny !

data.short_description: Hentai World Bunny is an arcade-style game where you challenge your focus and perseverance by finding and matching pairs of identical images for endless fun.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
